options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -route_adjust_auto_via_weight
options.description: {true|false} adjust auto via weight for via swapping

options.name: -route_allow_inst_overlaps
options.description: don't do instance overlap check

options.name: -route_ignore_follow_pin_shapes
options.description: {true|false} Ignore follow pin via shapes

options.name: -route_process_node
options.description: Specify the process node

options.name: -route_rc_extraction_corner
options.description: specific which RC extraction corner to use in routing

options.name: -route_skip_analog
options.description: skip routing nets or pins marked + USE ANALOG in the DEF file

options.name: -route_via_weight
options.description: set weight for vias

options.name: -route_detail_add_passive_fill_only_on_layers
options.description: <value> specify layers where passive fill will be added

options.name: -route_detail_allow_passive_fill_only_in_layers
options.description: <value> specify layers where do passive fill only

options.name: -route_detail_antenna_eco_list_file
options.description: <value> set file name for antenna eco list

options.name: -route_detail_auto_stop
options.description: control whether Nanoroute continues routing if there are many violations

options.name: -route_detail_check_mar_on_cell_pin
options.description: {true|false} Enable mar checking on used cell pins

options.name: -route_detail_end_iteration
options.description: specify the last iteration pass in a detailed routing step

options.name: -route_detail_fix_antenna
options.description: fix antenna violation by jumping metal layers

options.name: -route_detail_fix_antenna_on_secondary_pg_nets
options.description: {true|false} fix antenna violation on sencondary pg nets

options.name: -route_detail_fix_antenna_with_gate_array_filler_mode
options.description: {true|false} detect GA filler flow while doing antenna violation fixing

options.name: -route_detail_merge_abutting_cut
options.description: {true|false} merge two abutting cell cut shapes into a new one

options.name: -route_detail_min_length_for_spread_wire
options.description: <value> specify the min. length of a spreaded wire

options.name: -route_detail_min_length_for_widen_wire
options.description: <value> specify the min. length of a widened wire

options.name: -route_detail_min_slack_for_opt_wire
options.description: <value> specify the min slack for a net wire optimization

options.name: -route_detail_no_taper_in_layers
options.description: <value> Specifies the range of the layer where taper is not allowed

options.name: -route_detail_no_taper_on_output_pin
options.description: <value> forbid wire tapering at output pin

options.name: -route_detail_on_grid_only
options.description: route on grid only

options.name: -route_detail_post_route_litho_repair
options.description: {true|false} litho hotspot repair in post route stage

options.name: -route_detail_post_route_spread_wire
options.description: <value> spread wire in post route stage

options.name: -route_detail_post_route_swap_via
options.description: <value> to enforce post route via swapping mode in detail route command.

options.name: -route_detail_postroute_via_priority
options.description: <value> Set net priority for via swapping based on timing

options.name: -route_detail_post_route_via_pillar_effort
options.description: <value> Set opt effort/range for opportunistic via pillar

options.name: -route_detail_post_route_wire_widen
options.description: <value> widen wire in post route stage

options.name: -route_detail_post_route_wire_widen_rule
options.description: <value> specify the rule used to widen wire

options.name: -route_detail_search_and_repair
options.description: {true|false} run search-and-repair step after the initial detailed routing

options.name: -route_detail_signoff_effort
options.description: specify when to give up on irresolvable violations

options.name: -route_detail_stub_routing_in_first_layer
options.description: <value> to use Minimum routing in the first routing layer defined in the LEF

options.name: -route_detail_use_multi_cut_via_effort
options.description: <value> specify the effort to use multi-cut via during routing

options.name: -route_number_fail_limit
options.description: set limit for number of fails

options.name: -route_number_thread
options.description: set the number of processors to be used in one workstation for multi-threading

options.name: -route_number_warning_limit
options.description: set limit for number of warnings

options.name: -route_third_party_data
options.description: Allow third party data as input

options.name: -extract_keep_fill_wires
options.description: Keep metal fill wires for extraction

options.name: -route_high_freq_constraint_groups
options.description: <value> only route specified constraint groups, legal values are {net match bus pair shield}, add "order" in front to control route order

options.name: -route_high_freq_match_report_file
options.description: <value> specify match report file name

options.name: -route_high_freq_num_reserved_layers
options.description: <value> number of layers reserved for standard cell pin access

options.name: -route_high_freq_remove_floating_shield
options.description: {true|false} remove floating shield segments for high frequency nets

options.name: -route_high_freq_search_repair
options.description: run search and repair to remove violations, legal value is one of {auto false true only}

options.name: -route_high_freq_shield_trim_length
options.description: <value> specify minimum length of shielding wire to be kept

options.name: -route_interposer_allow_diagonal_trunk
options.description: <value> allow_diagonal_trunk

options.name: -route_interposer_control_options
options.description: <value> control options

options.name: -route_interposer_interlayer_shielding_layers
options.description: <value> interlayer shielding layers

options.name: -route_interposer_interlayer_shielding_nets
options.description: <value> interlayer shielding nets

options.name: -route_interposer_interlayer_shielding_offsets
options.description: <value> interlayer shielding offsets

options.name: -route_interposer_interlayer_shielding_widths
options.description: <value> interlayer shielding widths

options.name: -route_interposer_same_layer_shielding_net
options.description: <value> same_layer_shielding_net

options.name: -route_interposer_same_layer_shielding_width_spacing
options.description: <value> same_layer_shielding_width_spacing

options.name: -route_interposer_trunk_routing_layers
options.description: <value> trunk_routing_layers

options.name: -route_interposer_trunk_routing_width_spacing
options.description: <value> trunk_routing_width_spacing

options.name: -route_add_antenna_inst_prefix
options.description: prefix for the diode insts added to fix antenna

options.name: -route_allow_pin_as_feedthru
options.description: allow pin as feedthrough

options.name: -route_antenna_cell_name
options.description: specify the antenna diode cell names for antenna fixing

options.name: -route_concurrent_minimize_via_count_effort
options.description: <value> specify the effort of concurrent via minimization

options.name: -route_connect_to_bumps
options.description: connect to bumps in native NanoRoute in Innovus

options.name: -route_fix_clock_nets
options.description: set clock nets routing status to fixed or routed

options.name: -route_route_clock_nets_first
options.description: {true|false} route clock nets first

options.name: -route_disable_route_rule_on_via_pillar_to_special_net_wire
options.description: <value> Disable non-default rules on via pillar to special net wire

options.name: -route_eco_ignore_existing_route
options.description: <value> Ignore existing route in eco, mode: {all | signal}

options.name: -route_enable_route_rule_si_limit_length
options.description: <value> use MAR wire length as NDR PRL requirement for metal spacing check

options.name: -route_enforce_route_rule_on_special_net_wire
options.description: <value> enforce ndr rule on all special wire segments of specified nets

options.name: -route_extra_via_enclosure
options.description: specify an extra via enclosure to use when connecting to block pins and special net wires

options.name: -route_honor_exclusive_region
options.description: {true|false} honor exclusive region routing

options.name: -route_honor_power_domain
options.description: honor power domain routing

options.name: -route_ignore_antenna_top_cell_pin
options.description: {true|false} ignore antenna check on block I/O pins

options.name: -route_antenna_diode_insertion
options.description: {true|false} insert antenna diode to fix antenna violation

options.name: -route_diode_insertion_for_clock_nets
options.description: {true|false} allow diode insertion on clock nets

options.name: -route_shield_tap_cell_insertion
options.description: {true|false} insert tap cell for shielding

options.name: -route_relaxed_route_rule_spacing_to_power_ground_nets
options.description: <value> relax the spacing requirement from NDR spacing for the layers

options.name: -route_reserve_space_for_multi_cut
options.description: {true|false} Reserves space to insert multicut vias in postroute stage. This option has to be set before routing. After routing with this parameter specified, you can add double-cut vias or larger overhang vias by using the "routeDesign -viaOpt" command. For examples, see routeDesign.

options.name: -route_reverse_direction
options.description: reverse routing direction in area: (lx ly ux uy [bot_lyr : top_lyr]) ... , top_lyr and bot_lyr could be either layer name or layer routing id

options.name: -route_selected_net_only
options.description: route selected net only

options.name: -route_shield_crosstie_offset
options.description: Specifies the offset in terms of number of tracks for adding crossties. The default is 0 for all layers. The syntax is 'layer_name:numTrack1 layer_name2:numTrack2... '.

options.name: -route_shield_length_threshold
options.description: min route segment length below which there is no shielding needed

options.name: -route_shield_report_skip_status
options.description: {true|false} generate report file on if a net is skipped for shielding

options.name: -route_shield_stripe_layer_range
options.description: <value> specify the target layer range of stripes for tie net connection

options.name: -route_shield_tap_cell_name
options.description: specify the tap cell names for shielding

options.name: -route_strictly_honor_1d_routing
options.description: <value> Strictly honor 1d routing

options.name: -route_strict_honor_route_rule
options.description: Strictly enforce non-default rules

options.name: -route_stripe_layer_range
options.description: specify the target layer range of stripes for tie net connection

options.name: -route_tieoff_to_shapes
options.description: specify the target special wire shapes or target instance pin for tie net connection: [auto stripe ring powergroundpin]

options.name: -route_trim_pull_back_distance_from_boundary
options.description: <value> route_trim_pull_back_distance_from_boundary {<layer>:<value> ...}

options.name: -route_trunk_with_cluster_target_size
options.description: <value> global control of trunk routing pattern for nets with TRUNK pattern attribute. 0: nets with TRUNK pattern will be routed as Steiner tree; 1: default, nets will be routed as traditional trunk pattern, i.e., each pin directly connects to SNET trunk separately; >1: define a proximate max cluster size (in number of pins), and nets will be routed as fishbone style, i.e., several pins in a column are clustered together, and then connects to SNET trunk.

options.name: -route_use_auto_via
options.description: allow to use internal generated vias

options.name: -route_with_eco
options.description: enable eco routing

options.name: -route_with_litho_driven
options.description: enable the litho-driven routing

options.name: -route_with_si_driven
options.description: enable si driven routing

options.name: -route_with_timing_driven
options.description: enable timing driven routing

options.name: -route_with_trim_metal
options.description: set cut metal dgrid for short pin extension generated

options.name: -route_with_via_in_pin
options.description: enclose via in pin shape

options.name: -route_with_via_only_for_block_cell_pin
options.description: <value> enclose via in pin shape for macro cell pins

options.name: -route_with_via_only_for_stdcell_pin
options.description: <value> disable planar access to standard cell pins
